text.title: Secrets Rotation End-to-End Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the playbook-step artefact this methodology produces. The stdlib validator enforces required keys, per-field constraints, and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required fields missing. Slug is upper-case (must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]+$). Owner is a string, not the required {name, role} object.

antipattern.description: owner = team handle, channel handle, or empty string
antipattern.reason: Anonymous artefacts rot; named human required.

antipattern.description: evidence array empty while non-empty conclusions are present
antipattern.reason: Unevidenced conclusions are demoted to hypotheses.

antipattern.description: last_reviewed older than the published staleness window (default 90 days)
antipattern.reason: Stale artefacts drift from operating reality; treat as suspect on read.
